_comment: Single source of truth. Every other file in brand/ is generated from these values. Change here, then change the others to match.

chrome._comment: Identity colors. Used for headers, links, accents, KPI numbers, borders. NEVER used to encode data.

data._comment: Okabe & Ito (2008) colorblind-safe qualitative palette, reordered. Chosen for perception, not identity. Source: Okabe M, Ito K, 'Color Universal Design', https://jfly.uni-koeln.de/color/
data._semantic_comment: Blue and orange, not green and red. About 1 in 12 men cannot reliably tell green from red. Never rely on hue alone, always pair with a label, a shape, or a position.

type._comment: IBM Plex, SIL Open Font License. Free, technical in tone, has a real mono companion, and is not the Inter default that everyone else uses. See brand/README.md for the honest limits on font portability.

contrast_verified._comment: Measured, not estimated. WCAG AA body text needs 4.5, AAA needs 7.
